intent: Compact mid-market 2-bedroom on a smaller squarish lot. Only one bathroom — both bedrooms share a single common T&B accessed from the dining area. Kept comfortable rather than minimum: living should feel like a real living room, master should still be meaningfully larger than the standard bedroom, and the kitchen has enough counter space for daily cooking.
must_haves: single common bath shared by both bedrooms
common bath off dining for public access
wet-core wall between common bath and kitchen plumbing
